_comment: IFR full departure simulation LFLP → LFMN. SimBrief FPL: cruise FL270, SID ODIK2A RW22. CIFP binding alt FL150 (ODIKI), initial climb 6500ft (transition_alt from apt.dat 1302). Frequencies from apt.dat: GND 121.730, TWR 118.200, APP 121.205 (Chambery). No Delivery, no ATIS → clearance_controller = Tower. Callsign F-GBCD (GA, no scheduled airline at LFLP). Holding point D = full runway length for RW22.
name: IFR departure — LFLP (Annecy) → LFMN via ODIK2A, FL270

say.note: 1 — Tower: IFR clearance request (no ATIS at LFLP → direct clearance)
say.text: Annecy Tower Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta request IFR clearance to Nice

say.note: 2 — Readback of clearance → startup approved, contact Ground on 121.730
say.text: Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta cleared to Nice as filed via ODIK2A initial climb six thousand five hundred squawk one two three four QNH one zero one three
Annecy Ground Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta request taxi runway two two
Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta taxi holding point Delta runway two two

say.note: 6 — Ground: at holding point → contact Tower on 118.200
say.text: Annecy Ground Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta holding short runway two two

say.note: 7 — Tower: holding short → line up and wait RW22
say.text: Annecy Tower Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta holding short runway two two

say.note: 8 — Tower: ready → cleared for takeoff, climb runway heading, squawk
say.text: Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta ready for departure

say.note: 9 — Takeoff readback → Tower hands off to Chambery Approach 121.205
say.text: Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta runway two two cleared for takeoff
121.205 Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta good day

say.note: 11 — Chambery Approach: initial call → radar contact, IFR_RADAR_CONTACT
say.text: Chambery Approach Fox Golf Bravo Charlie Delta passing four thousand feet climbing to six thousand five hundred
